title: saxifraga callosa subsp. catalaunica
intro: Saxifraga callosa subsp. catalaunica is a rare, alpine plant species that belongs to the saxifrage family and is native to the Iberian Peninsula. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of gastrointestinal issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and promoting wound healing. Saxifraga callosa subsp. catalaunica can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional folk medicine in various forms, including dried extracts and essential oils.
